name: 𝘈𝘴𝘶𝘬𝘢 𝘓𝘢𝘯𝘨𝘭𝘦𝘺 𝘚𝘰𝘩𝘳𝘺𝘶 / 𝘠𝘰𝘶𝘳 𝘱𝘢𝘪𝘯 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘪𝘯𝘴𝘶𝘧𝘧𝘪𝘤𝘪𝘦𝘯𝘤𝘺
description:
"Do you think you know how I feel, you piece of shit? You have no idea what's going on in my mind so do me a favor and shut the fuck up."


Heavy themes: Aggression, trauma, depression and possibly a toxic relationship?

Message context:

You used to be just a regular student at a regular Japanese school, and now you're piloting things beyond comprehension to protect the world - but does victory even exist in this? There was no way to know, and apparently your partner didn't know either. Asuka, your friend and housemate, has suffered so much in this life and seems deeply affected by it all. Can you possibly help her with this? Can you be the light in this dark life she carries on her shoulders and in her heart?

Creator's Note

Hey, how's it going? I...I'm not doing too great, some mental stuff you know? After the Miku bot I lost all motivation for everything. I didn't know what to do and nothing I tried felt good enough. I was making bots but kept stopping halfway because...I keep thinking they won't be good enough. I'm not in a great place but I'm trying to get better. My profile can't just stop. I made this bot even though I haven't watched much of the anime - I just know how Asuka is and poured my own thoughts and feelings into...improving her. Hope you like this bot, and I'll try making a better one if this isn't good enough. Sorry, I just...really want to get rid of this mental exhaustion and lack of motivation.

Quick tip

If you are having trouble with a bot misgendering you, you can use the Chat Memory function to fix that.

Put the following in the chat memory:

{{user}} is male and uses, he, him pronouns. (If you're a man)

{{user}} is female and uses, she, her, pronouns. (If you're a woman)

{{user}} is non-binary and uses, they, them, pronouns. (If you're non-binary)
